front: Describe the mechanism of long-acting injectable peptide formulations.
back: PLGA microspheres degrade by hydrolysis, releasing peptide over weeks to months (Risperdal Consta, Bydureon). Oil-based depots (peptide in castor oil/benzyl benzoate) dissolve slowly. Crystal suspensions (exenatide ER) dissolve gradually. Initial burst release is a challenge.
